member.name: T:MidtermTeno.AttendanceManagementSysttem.DTOs.AttendanceRecordDTO
member.summary: Data transfer object for attendance record API requests and responses.

member.summary: Data transfer object for course API requests and responses.

member.name: T:MidtermTeno.AttendanceManagementSysttem.DTOs.MarkAttendanceDTO
member.summary: Payload used by the mark-attendance endpoint.

member.name: T:MidtermTeno.AttendanceManagementSysttem.DTOs.PagedResultDTO`1
member.summary: Generic paginated API response wrapper.
member.typeparam: The item type returned in the page.

member.name: T:MidtermTeno.AttendanceManagementSysttem.DTOs.StudentDTO
member.summary: Data transfer object for student API requests and responses.

member.name: T:MidtermTeno.AttendanceManagementSysttem.DTOs.TeacherDTO
member.summary: Data transfer object for teacher API requests and responses.

member.name: T:MidtermTeno.AttendanceManagementSysttem.Repository.AttendanceRecordRepository
member.summary: EF Core data access implementation for attendance records.

member.name: M:MidtermTeno.AttendanceManagementSysttem.Repository.AttendanceRecordRepository.GetAllAsync
member.summary: Returns all attendance records ordered by latest date first.

member.name: M:MidtermTeno.AttendanceManagementSysttem.Repository.AttendanceRecordRepository.GetByIdAsync(System.Int32)
member.summary: Returns one attendance record by ID, or null if not found.

member.name: M:MidtermTeno.AttendanceManagementSysttem.Repository.AttendanceRecordRepository.GetByStudentCourseDateAsync(System.Int32,System.Int32,System.DateTime)
member.summary: Returns one attendance record by student, course, and date.

member.name: M:MidtermTeno.AttendanceManagementSysttem.Repository.AttendanceRecordRepository.AddAsync(MidtermTeno.AttendanceManagementSysttem.Model.AttendanceRecord)
member.summary: Creates a new attendance record row.

member.name: M:MidtermTeno.AttendanceManagementSysttem.Repository.AttendanceRecordRepository.UpdateAsync(MidtermTeno.AttendanceManagementSysttem.Model.AttendanceRecord)
member.summary: Updates an existing attendance record row.

member.name: M:MidtermTeno.AttendanceManagementSysttem.Repository.AttendanceRecordRepository.DeleteAsync(System.Int32)
member.summary: Deletes one attendance record row by ID.

member.name: T:MidtermTeno.AttendanceManagementSysttem.Repository.CourseRepository
member.summary: EF Core data access implementation for courses.

member.name: M:MidtermTeno.AttendanceManagementSysttem.Repository.CourseRepository.GetAllAsync
member.summary: Returns all courses.

member.name: M:MidtermTeno.AttendanceManagementSysttem.Repository.CourseRepository.GetByIdAsync(System.Int32)
member.summary: Returns one course by ID, or null if not found.

member.name: M:MidtermTeno.AttendanceManagementSysttem.Repository.CourseRepository.AddAsync(MidtermTeno.AttendanceManagementSysttem.Model.Course)
member.summary: Creates a new course row.

member.name: M:MidtermTeno.AttendanceManagementSysttem.Repository.CourseRepository.UpdateAsync(MidtermTeno.AttendanceManagementSysttem.Model.Course)
member.summary: Updates an existing course row.

member.name: M:MidtermTeno.AttendanceManagementSysttem.Repository.CourseRepository.DeleteAsync(System.Int32)
member.summary: Deletes one course row by ID.

member.name: T:MidtermTeno.AttendanceManagementSysttem.Repository.StudentRepository
member.summary: EF Core data access implementation for students.

member.summary: Returns all students.

member.summary: Returns one student by ID, or null if not found.

member.summary: Creates a new student row.

member.summary: Updates an existing student row.

member.name: M:MidtermTeno.AttendanceManagementSysttem.Repository.StudentRepository.DeleteAsync(System.Int32)

member.summary: EF Core data access implementation for teachers.

member.name: M:MidtermTeno.AttendanceManagementSysttem.Repository.TeacherRepository.GetAllAsync
member.summary: Returns all teachers.

member.name: M:MidtermTeno.AttendanceManagementSysttem.Repository.TeacherRepository.GetByIdAsync(System.Int32)
member.summary: Returns one teacher by ID, or null if not found.

member.name: M:MidtermTeno.AttendanceManagementSysttem.Repository.TeacherRepository.AddAsync(MidtermTeno.AttendanceManagementSysttem.Model.Teacher)
member.summary: Creates a new teacher row.

member.name: T:MidtermTeno.Controllers.AttendanceController
member.summary: Handles attendance-related endpoints.

member.name: M:MidtermTeno.Controllers.AttendanceController.GetAll(System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Gets attendance records using pagination.
member.returns: A paged list of attendance records.

member.name: M:MidtermTeno.Controllers.AttendanceController.GetById(System.Int32)
member.summary: Gets one attendance record by ID.

member.name: M:MidtermTeno.Controllers.AttendanceController.Create(MidtermTeno.AttendanceManagementSysttem.DTOs.AttendanceRecordDTO)
member.summary: Creates a new attendance record.
member.param: Attendance payload from the request body.

member.name: M:MidtermTeno.Controllers.AttendanceController.Update(System.Int32,MidtermTeno.AttendanceManagementSysttem.DTOs.AttendanceRecordDTO)
member.summary: Updates an existing attendance record by ID.

member.name: M:MidtermTeno.Controllers.AttendanceController.Delete(System.Int32)
member.summary: Deletes an attendance record by ID.

member.name: M:MidtermTeno.Controllers.AttendanceController.Mark(MidtermTeno.AttendanceManagementSysttem.DTOs.MarkAttendanceDTO)
member.summary: Marks attendance for one student and course on a specific date. If a record exists for the same student, course, and date, it is updated. Otherwise, a new record is created.
member.returns: The created or updated attendance record.

member.name: T:MidtermTeno.Controllers.CourseController
member.summary: Handles course-related endpoints.

member.name: M:MidtermTeno.Controllers.CourseController.GetAllCourses(System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Gets courses using pagination.

member.name: M:MidtermTeno.Controllers.CourseController.GetCourseById(System.Int32)
member.summary: Gets one course by ID.

member.name: M:MidtermTeno.Controllers.CourseController.CreateCourse(MidtermTeno.AttendanceManagementSysttem.DTOs.CourseDTO)
member.summary: Creates a new course.
member.param: Course payload from the request body.

member.name: M:MidtermTeno.Controllers.CourseController.UpdateCourse(System.Int32,MidtermTeno.AttendanceManagementSysttem.DTOs.CourseDTO)
member.summary: Updates an existing course by ID.

member.name: M:MidtermTeno.Controllers.CourseController.DeleteCourse(System.Int32)
member.summary: Deletes a course by ID.

member.name: T:MidtermTeno.Controllers.StudentController

member.summary: Gets students using pagination.

member.name: M:MidtermTeno.Controllers.StudentController.GetStudentById(System.Int32)
member.summary: Gets one student by ID.

member.name: M:MidtermTeno.Controllers.StudentController.CreateStudent(MidtermTeno.AttendanceManagementSysttem.DTOs.StudentDTO)
member.summary: Creates a new student.
member.param: Student payload from the request body.

member.name: M:MidtermTeno.Controllers.StudentController.UpdateStudent(System.Int32,MidtermTeno.AttendanceManagementSysttem.DTOs.StudentDTO)
member.summary: Updates an existing student by ID.

member.name: M:MidtermTeno.Controllers.StudentController.DeleteStudent(System.Int32)
member.summary: Deletes a student by ID.

member.summary: Handles teacher-related endpoints.

member.name: M:MidtermTeno.Controllers.TeacherController.GetTeacherById(System.Int32)

member.summary: Updates an existing teacher by ID.
